name: sgt-daystore
description: SGT-Daystore: Sistema de gestión de inventario, ventas y seguridad IoT

scripts.install:all: cd backend-negocio && npm install && cd ../backend-iot && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd backend-negocio && npm run build && cd ../backend-iot && npm run build
scripts.docker:seed: docker compose exec -T backend-negocio node dist/seeds/seed-users.js && docker compose exec -T backend-negocio node dist/seeds/seed-inventario.js
